name: clarvia
description: AI Agent Tool Directory & AEO Scanner — Search 12,800+ tools scored for agent readiness

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search 12,800+ AI agent tools by keyword, category, or AEO score

tools.name: scan_service
tools.description: Run a full AEO audit on any URL for agent discoverability and quality

tools.name: get_service_details
tools.description: Get detailed AEO evaluation report for a previously scanned service

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all tool categories with service counts

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate directory statistics — total services, average score, distribution

tools.name: register_service
tools.description: Submit a new tool or API for Clarvia indexing and AEO scoring

tools.name: clarvia_gate_check
tools.description: Quick pass/fail safety check for agent tool-use decisions with agent grade

tools.name: clarvia_batch_check
tools.description: Batch-check up to 10 URLs — pass/fail and agent grade for each

tools.name: clarvia_find_alternatives
tools.description: Find higher-rated alternative tools in a category by agent-readiness score

tools.name: clarvia_probe
tools.description: Live accessibility probe — reachability, latency, OpenAPI, MCP, agents.json

tools.name: clarvia_submit_feedback
tools.description: Report tool usage outcome to build community reliability data
